list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List PDF Form Field Names Using FormEditor
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with FormEditor, retrieving all AcroForm field names via the Form facade, and printing them to the console.

add-text-field-to-pdf.title: Add Text Field to PDF Using FormEditor
add-text-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a new text field at given coordinates on a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

fill-textbox-field-pdf.title: Fill TextBox Field in PDF using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
fill-textbox-field-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to fill an existing AcroForm text box field with a string value using the Form facade and save the updated PDF.

justify-textbox-alignment.title: Justify Text in a Filled PDF Textbox
justify-textbox-alignment.description: Shows how to apply justified alignment to a filled textbox field in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

retrieve-radio-button-options-into-hasht.title: Retrieve Radio Button Option Values into Hashtable
retrieve-radio-button-options-into-hasht.description: Demonstrates how to read all option values of a radio button group from a PDF using Form.GetButtonOptionValues and store them in a non‑generic Hashtable.

get-selected-radio-button-value.title: Get Selected Radio Button Value from PDF Form
get-selected-radio-button-value.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a radio button group, and read the currently selected option using the Value property of RadioButtonOptionField.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to export all AcroForm field values from a PDF document to an XML file using the Form facade's ExportXml method.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to export form field values from a PDF document to an FDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm field data from a PDF to an XFDF file using the Form facade.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON and Verify Structure
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm field values from a PDF to a JSON file using Form.ExportJson and validates the resulting JSON structure.

import-form-fields-from-xml.title: Import Form Field Values from XML into PDF
import-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with the Form facade, import AcroForm field values from an XML stream using ImportXml, and save the updated document.

import-fdf-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import FDF Data into PDF Form
import-fdf-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an FDF file, import its field values into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and save the filled PDF.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to load an XFDF file and import its form field values into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade, then save the updated document.

import-form-data-from-json.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
import-form-data-from-json.description: Shows how to load a JSON file containing form field values and import them into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade, then save the updated document.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate over several PDF files, load each with FormEditor, and export the AcroForm fields to individual XML files.

batch-import-json-data-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import JSON Data into PDFs in Parallel
batch-import-json-data-into-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to import form data from matching JSON files into PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and process multiple files concurrently with Parallel.ForEach.

combine-acroform-json-exports.title: Combine AcroForm JSON Exports from Multiple PDFs
combine-acroform-json-exports.description: Demonstrates how to export form data from several PDF files to JSON, merge the fragments into a single JSON array, and save it to a file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml__v2.description: Shows how to export AcroForm field data from a PDF directly to an XML stream with Aspose.Pdf, avoiding any intermediate files on disk.

merge-acroform-data-into-json.title: Merge AcroForm Data from Multiple PDFs into a Single JSON
merge-acroform-data-into-json.description: Shows how to bind each PDF to the Form facade, export its form fields as JSON, and combine the results into one JSON array.

filter-customer-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.title: Filter Exported AcroForm Fields Starting with "Customer"
filter-customer-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to XFDF, keep only fields whose names begin with "Customer", and write the filtered XML to a file.

export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export Selected AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to export only specific AcroForm fields from a PDF to a JSON file by using WidgetAnnotation.ExportToJson and aggregating the results.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form (Ignore Missing Fields)
import-json-data-into-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, import form field values from a JSON file, and save the updated document while automatically ignoring any JSON fields that are not present in the PDF.

validate-xml-import-data-into-pdf-form.title: Validate XML and Import Data into PDF Form
validate-xml-import-data-into-pdf-form.description: The example validates an XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, imports the XML data into an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf. It demonstrates XML schema validation and form data import.

unicode-form-field-utf8-xfdf.title: Handle Unicode Form Fields with UTF‑8 XFDF Export/Import
unicode-form-field-utf8-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting AcroForm fields to an XFDF file using UTF‑8 encoding, then importing the XFDF back into the PDF so that Unicode characters are preserved in form field values.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: Export PDF Form Fields to CSV
export-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF document, enumerates all AcroForm fields using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor, and writes each field's name and .NET type to a CSV report.

export-text-field-names-to-json.title: Export Text Field Names from PDF AcroForm to JSON
export-text-field-names-to-json.description: Shows how to iterate over AcroForm fields, filter for text fields, and write the field names to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-radio-button-group-default-selection.title: Add Radio Button Group with Default Selection using FormEditor
add-radio-button-group-default-selection.description: Demonstrates how to create a radio button group with three options, arrange them, and set a default selected option programmatically using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

validate-radio-button-options.title: Validate Radio Button Options in an AcroForm
validate-radio-button-options.description: Demonstrates how to load an AcroForm, retrieve the option values of a radio button group, and compare them against an expected set to verify form integrity.

xfdf-roundtrip-form-data.title: Round‑Trip XFDF Export and Import for AcroForm Fields
xfdf-roundtrip-form-data.description: Demonstrates exporting filled AcroForm fields to XFDF in memory, importing them back into a fresh PDF, and verifying that the field values are preserved.

fill-pdf-form-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-form-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF form, import field values from a JSON file, and save the populated document using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Byte Array
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array using a MemoryStream, fills the specified AcroForm fields, and returns the modified PDF as a byte array.

list-pdf-form-field-names-json.title: List PDF Form Field Names as JSON
list-pdf-form-field-names-json.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, extracting all AcroForm field names, and printing them as an indented JSON array.

fill-pdf-acroform-fields.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields and Save
fill-pdf-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to open a PDF containing AcroForm fields, populate them from a dictionary of values using the appropriate FillField overloads, and save the modified document with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Deserialize with Json.NET
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then deserialize the JSON into a strongly‑typed C# object with Json.NET.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v2.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form using Aspose.Pdf
import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to serialize a C# object to JSON, load it into a MemoryStream, and import the values into an AcroForm PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON with File Splitting
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, extracting AcroForm field names and values, serializing them to JSON, and writing the output into multiple files each limited to a maximum number of fields.

export-pdf-form-to-xml-and-html.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Convert to HTML via XSLT
export-pdf-form-to-xml-and-html.description: Shows how to export AcroForm field data from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then transform the XML into an HTML view with XSLT.

import-xml-into-acroform-validate-requir.title: Import XML Data into AcroForm and Validate Required Fields
import-xml-into-acroform-validate-requir.description: Shows how to load a PDF with AcroForm fields, import field values from an XML file, check required fields for empty or missing values, and save the updated document.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v3.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form and Handle Missing Fields
import-json-data-into-pdf-form__v3.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF form, importing field values from a JSON file, catching missing form fields via FormException, and saving the updated PDF.

async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Asynchronously Export PDF Form Data to XML
async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF document to an XML file using async/await, preventing UI thread blocking.

generate-pdf-form-fields-report.title: Generate PDF Form Fields Report
generate-pdf-form-fields-report.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, creates a new PDF containing a table with each field's name, type, and value, and saves the report.
